title: Theory Key of Nebuchadnezzar
wikitext:
[]: Theory: Key of Nebuchadnezzar             Quote Post by Berserker » Sun Jan 31, 2021 5:59 am Basically what the title says. A speculation about the possible use of the key of nebuchadnezzar by now, prior to the continuation of the storyline in upcoming shin eva. So, Seele's plan was to initiate instrumentality using the true evangelion, mark 6 to come in contact with Lilith, thus starting the 3rd impact, while Gendo's was to use awakened Eva 1 to initiate the impact and open the guf. When Kaji stole the key, he also passed the information of the construction of mark 6 on tabgha base to Gendo and Fuyutsuki, of which Seele kept Nerv in the dark. After that they knew their method of using Eva 1 will fail, yet it was worth a shot so Gendo ordered it to be hastened. So he had his back up plan coming, which forthwith became his primary plan, using the key of nebuchadnezzar, "the key which will open the door to human instrumentality"(according to Gendo), which can simply be implied to anything that can open the guf. Even after going to the moon for visual confirmation, they went ahead with their first plan of using Eva 1, even though they knew it'll be going in vain. Anyway, Eva 1 awakened, Kaworu put it to sleep. From the preview shot, he descended to central dogma without the lance of cassius, which obviously implies he did it right after impaling Eva 1, as Seele sure likes to jump in whenever they get chance, without any sort of waiting whatsoever. So, after this point everything's just speculized as we don't see anything of this event. So my speculation is either like the series counterpart, Kaworu came to the realization of humanity's value but as he mentioned mark 6 was "modified to be autonomous by the lilin(possibly Keel)", meaning after Kaworu refused to make contact, the Eva was being piloted by the will of the twelfth angel like the dummy plug. Now as far fetched as it sounds, my hypothesis is that the twelfth angel was deliberately fitted as the core of mark 6 by Seele, the whole thing being a core is stated by Mari, which explains why it was in it in the first place as well as mark 6 being "autonomous" to Kaworu. Every angels' goal is the same, to come in contact with Lilith(in rebuild. Adam in series) to initiate an impact to retreive the planet from Lilins, which they blindly try to obey without questioning anything. So even after getting captured and used somehow by Seele to be refitted as the core, when it sensed Lilith nearby, it took control of mark 6, being the core of it, leaving Kaworu totally astonished. The rest is pretty short, it came in contact, which Kaworu didn't want at that point but Seele did, Kaworu used his angelic power to regain the control and retrieve cassius like Eva 1 did in EoE in case of longinus from the moon, impaling mark 6 on its core and probably also decapitating Lilith as the contact was already ongoing(could also be autonomous mark 6's work, trying to gain control over Lilith by merging with her in place of her head as we see mark 6 merged with Lilith's neck in 3.0), leaving the Eva, the angel and N3I to a halt. OR, Kaworu was going according to plan, coming in contact with Lilith unlike the series. But midway the angel taking control of Eva made him think Seele betrayed him, as a result going against their plan. Both ways he didn't realize the cause of mark 6 going out of his control, thinking it was made autonomous mechanically, which explains why he was so shocked of seeing the angel and getting demoted as the thirteenth angel. Ok, this got me carried away, but the former one is more plausible. Anyway, the main analysis on the key of nebuchadnezzar is that it's already been put to an use, rebirth given to it as an Eva as well as having the status of being one of the surviving Adams. Unlike the series, there are 4 Adams here in rebuild, giving each on a different fate and use by mankind. The series Adam got reduced to an embryo, later being grafted to Gendo's hand using it to implement his version of instrumentality. The rebuild ones also have their roles fulfilled- Eva 1,6,9 and 13 each being one of the surviving Adam(mark 9 is rather called vessel of the Adams, but whatever). One might argue Eva 1 isn't, as the series shows it being created from Lilith, giving it the name of "true child/descendent of Lilith". But given a lot of things changed in the rebuild compared to the original series as well as Eva 1 going through DMS pseudo evolution(evolution going backwards), returning to its primal state, which visibly has 3 eyes, 2 cores and wings, divine innate power from Adam like the ability to open guf and initiate an impact; leaving every reason to call it one of the surviving Adam. Anyway, this fulfills the role of each 4 Adam after 2nd impact. But even after so, there lives the key of nebuchadnezzar, serving the role of the embryo from the series, making it one of the Adams being reduced to a somewhat human nerve system thing, the one Adam that actually didn't "survive". Even so, the numbers don't match. So, my speculation is it's either mark 9 or Eva 13. As for the reasons for it being mark 9, that thing was basically nothing but a nerve system, every tissue except the nerve ones of its body being nulled out of existence, which explains why mark 9 was fragile comparing to other Evas as every tissue had to be made artificially. Also it didn't have any head, or the part of the nerve system that was supposed to be its head, yet being a living object, explaining how mark 9 was still fuctioning without a head, which it probably got from the remains of Eva 0's head which Zeruel spat out or being cloned from that or probably even regrown by Nerv. Any ways or another, the head of mark 9 is totally artificial IMO. Also the fact that it was nothing but a nerve system can indirectly hint how it hacked into Wunder's mainframe to gain its control, even though the reason behind it is obviously what Ritsuko mentions, mark 9 being the true master of Wunder. This last point doesn't make any sense, I know. But that was the first thing that came in my mind beforehand of Ritsuko uttering the said statement. For it being Eva 13, easily a whole bunch of reason to call it, but first rather the most important one, again, "the key which will open the door to human instrumentality", which is self explanatory. The fact that Eva 13 had to be grown and constructed in a biomechanical womb while the other surviving ones were simply modified and outfitted as an Eva, implying it was grown from a somewhat reduced state, in this case nebuchadnezzar's key. After going through DMS phase, Mari refers Eva 13 as a straggler Adam, meaning it IS one of the Adams, but different than a surviving one like Eva 1 or mark 6, as it probably had a different consequence on account of the impact, rather a catastrophic one like got heavily damaged or shrank or anything. In this case, we only see such distinction only in the key, which is obviously one of the Adams. The syringe thing had a somewhat infinity symbol on it , later which can be seen as a depiction, conjoining the entry plugs from behind Kaworu and Shinji . Not much of a significant and efficacious point, but still something. The statement of Kaji regarding the key- "waymark that'll entwine god and soul" can be meant to signify the same thing that Kaworu said, "in order to retrieve both spears(the objects that'll basically start instrumentality, a waymark that'll led humankind cross upon the path of divinity) two souls are needed, hence the necessity of double entry plug." What Kaworu didn't include, intentionally or not, is that this method practically interwined god(Adam≈Kaworu) and soul(Shinji). Thus the waymark entwining god and soul leading to divinity(instrumentality) is key of nebuchadnezzar, theoretically Eva 13. Eva 13 theory seems more valid to me, as other than Eva 1 it was the only other Eva able to initiate an impact and opening the guf, which theoretically speaking, is the only possible interpretation of "the key which will open the door to instrumentality". Pardon me if there's any misinterpretation of the lore, as rebuild lore is quite complex in comparison to its extent. Also, I've been avoiding most of the spoilers and teasers. As a result I can't tell if Nebuchadnezzar's key will be shown explicitly or whatnot in shin eva. If that's affirmative, then all of this is basically worthless and I apologize if that's the case.

[]: Re: Theory: Key of Nebuchadnezzar             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Feb 04, 2021 3:51 pm I like the idea of the 12th angel being mark.06's core from the beginning. It may explain why Kaworu seemed surprised and makes a lot of sense if the goal was to start an artificial impact.
